response: LeBron James, at 40 years old, delivered a stellar season for the Los Angeles Lakers in 2024-25, averaging 28.4 points, 7.2 rebounds, and 8.1 assists per game across 71 contests while earning his latest All-Star selection. The four-decade-old superstar continued to defy expectations, leading his team with elite all-around production and cementing his legacy as one of the game’s greatest players.
